title: biophytum sensitivum
intro: Biophytum sensitivum, also known as the 'Tulsi of the mountains' or 'Tulsi of the forest', is a small, succulent plant belonging to the family Oxalidaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Biophytum sensitivum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
